features: Bright Lively Colours – Each pistol comes in a fun, vibrant colour that appeals to children.
Compact and Lightweight – Small design is easy for kids to hold and enjoy water fights.
Durable Construction – Made from sturdy materials to withstand repeated play.
Versatile Summer Fun – Ideal for pool parties, beach outings, or outdoor water games.
Set of Four – Multiple pistols allow group play, making water fights more exciting and interactive.
description: Product description Make summer more exciting with this 4-piece set of Mini Water Transparent Guns. Each small water pistol comes in a bright, lively colour, ideal for boys and girls to enjoy fun in the pool, at the beach, or during outdoor parties. Lightweight and easy to use, these squirt blasters provide hours of entertainment while keeping children active. Compact design ensures comfortable handling for small hands, and the durable construction allows repeated water fights without worry. Add vibrant and playful fun to summer activities with these colourful water pistols suitable for kids of all ages. Safety Warning NO
